summary: Good soundboard recording with noticeable tape flutter in the final guitar jam, overall positive impression
review: The fan notes that this soundboard source sounds generally solid but suffers from tape flutter during the last few minutes of the guitar‑led jam, making it a bit less clear than another SBD version. Despite that flaw the reviewer gave it four stars, indicating an overall favorable view of the performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review; positive rating but mentions a technical defect (flutter). Weighted estimate leans toward average‑good show quality with decent recording, yielding a mid‑range star rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Tape flutter audible in the final guitar jam; overall clear but not as clean as another SBD version.
